verdict_reason: The implication asks the engineer to 'notice your work across three Mondays. If quality oscillates with the team's guṇa — sharp in sattva, frantic in rajas, fogged in tamas — the buddhi described here is not yet established.' Reproducible: the operator can examine their actual recent PR review quality, design-doc thoroughness, and incident-handling artifacts across team-state shifts. The diagnostic is in artifacts, not self-report — the falsifiability clause makes that explicit. The counter-example correctly carves out the genuine-crisis case where intensity adjustment is correct, not pathological. The verse explicitly tags itself STRETCHED so the reproducibility claim is honestly bounded: this is an operational reflection, not the verse's full metaphysical claim. Reproducible at the operational layer. PASS.
